name: gameday-ops
description: Live game coverage operations — real-time monitoring, in-game analysis, leverage tracking, and rapid post-game recaps. Imports the production bsi-gameday-ops skill with 6 reference docs and 4 output templates.

interface.shortDescription: Live game coverage desk — monitor, analyze, recap in real time
interface.longDescription: Gameday Operations runs the live coverage desk. When a game is in progress it routes to real-time monitoring, leverage-situation tracking, win-probability reads, and rapid post-game recap generation. Triggers automatically on phrases like "live game", "game thread", "current inning", "walk-off", or during college baseball game hours (Tue–Sun, 2 PM – 11 PM CT). Routes from college-baseball and team-specific intelligence plugins. Includes 6 reference workflows (live-monitoring, leverage-situations, single-game-focus, post-game-recap, handoff-protocol, tool-priority) and 4 output templates. Wired to the Blaze Sports Intel MCP at blazesportsintel.com/mcp for live data.
interface.defaultPrompt: What college baseball games are in progress right now? Give me the leverage situations in the close ones.
